event: transferred from a small hospital to the University Clinical Centre of Republika Srpska in Banja Luka
massive bilateral pneumonia with minimal pleural effusions on chest CT
drug doses adjusted for renal function
norepinephrine requirements lowered from 0.6 to 0.15 μg/kg/min
deterioration of the patient's clinical condition
second therapy session of CytoSorb® commenced
ventilation parameters and lung function gradually improved
patient weaned off from the ventilator
